generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are now contributing over 30% of their defense budgets to collective security? Meanwhile, some politicians want to cut our commitments, leaving us vulnerable. Let's stand strong and honor our alliances—it's the only way to ensure lasting peace. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
